supportZones.label: Primary support
supportZones.reasoning: Area where buyers need to defend trend structure.

supportZones.label: Deeper reset support
supportZones.reasoning: Would represent a more attractive add zone if thesis remains intact.

resistanceZones.label: Near-term resistance
resistanceZones.reasoning: Area where stretched expectations may meet supply.

resistanceZones.label: Breakout confirmation
resistanceZones.reasoning: Sustained move above this zone would improve upside confirmation.

catalysts.title: Next earnings window
catalysts.notes: Mock placeholder until live earnings calendar is connected.

catalysts.title: AI enterprise adoption narrative
catalysts.notes: Thesis support depends on revenue conversion, not narrative alone.

riskScenarios.name: Valuation compression
riskScenarios.trigger: Multiple compression while growth expectations remain high.

riskScenarios.name: Trend invalidation
riskScenarios.trigger: Breaks primary support and fails to reclaim it.

thesis: PLTR remains a high-expectation AI software compounder candidate. Upside depends on durable enterprise adoption and margin discipline; risk is that valuation already prices too much execution perfection.
invalidation: Break below the primary support zone with deteriorating revenue growth narrative or earnings revision pressure.
